_comment: Shared record shop interior. Crates print discovery flavor (real crate-digging is a future activity). storeexit returns to wherever you entered from (storeReturn flag), so any city's records building can point here.
name: Wax & Wane Records

objects.name: Soul / Funk crate
objects.flavor: You flip through warped soul 45s. Somewhere in here is a record that'll change your sound.

objects.name: Local Bands crate
objects.flavor: A hand-labeled crate of local pressings. (Crate-digging to discover bands lands in a later build.)

objects.name: Bargain bin
objects.flavor: Three-for-a-dollar bin. Scratched, loved, mostly unplayable. You love it.
